# Auto-Generated vs Hand-Authored Docs

<!-- TODO(Phase 3): write — document the three generation modes:
- AUTO (generation: auto): code-generated, hand-edits rejected by CI.
  Used for docs/user/reference/api/, cli.md, server-api.md, entry-points.md.
- HAND (generation: hand): fully hand-authored.
  Used for all docs/contributing/ and most docs/user/ files.
- HYBRID (generation: hybrid): scaffold auto, body hand-authored.
  Used for tutorials with generated gallery scaffold + written narrative. -->
